---
title: "Objective"
generated: true
description: "Scalar / least-squares objective over the transform parameters."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register`](../nitrix-register.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.register._objective`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:Objective -->
```python
class Objective(Protocol)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:Objective -->
Scalar / least-squares objective over the transform parameters.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:Objective.cost -->
```python
cost(params: Float[Array, ' p']) -> Float[Array, '']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Scalar minimisation cost at `params` (lower is better).

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:Objective.residual -->
```python
residual(params: Float[Array, ' p']) -> Float[Array, ' m']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Least-squares residual at `params`.

Defined only when `is_least_squares` is `True`, in which case
the cost equals half the squared Euclidean norm of this residual.


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:Objective -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
